name: Refund and Billing Adjustment Policy
rules: Duplicate or erroneous charges are refunded in full within 5 business days once verified against the billing system.
Refund requests must be raised within 60 days of the charge date.
Premium and enterprise customers are eligible for expedited refund processing (48 hours).
Partial refunds for unused subscription periods are pro-rated to the day of cancellation.

name: Support Response SLA
rules: High-urgency issues: first response within 4 business hours for enterprise and premium customers, 8 business hours for others.
Confirmed service-impacting bugs must be escalated to engineering within 1 business day.
Customers must receive a status update at least every 48 hours while a high-urgency ticket is open.

name: Escalation Rules
rules: Enterprise accounts reporting service-impacting issues escalate directly to their dedicated account team.
Any credible churn signal from a premium or enterprise account is routed to the retention team within 24 hours.
Abuse reports involving threats or harassment are escalated to Trust & Safety immediately.

name: Acceptable Use and Abuse Handling Policy
rules: Feedback containing threats, harassment, or hate speech is logged verbatim and routed to Trust & Safety.
CS officers do not engage with abusive content beyond a single standard acknowledgement.
Repeated violations may lead to account suspension under the acceptable use terms.

name: General Feedback Handling Policy
rules: Positive feedback is acknowledged within 2 business days; beyond logging, no further action is required.
Feature requests are recorded in the product feedback backlog with the customer tier attached; no delivery dates are committed.
Feedback that fits no defined category is logged and routed to a CS lead for weekly triage.

name: Customer Retention Offers Policy
rules: Retention discounts of up to 20% (premium) or 30% (enterprise) may be offered; larger discounts require team-lead approval.
A retention offer is limited to one per customer per rolling 12 months.
Retention offers are not extended to accounts with an open abuse violation.
